title: Add wiremock-backed screenshot HTTP integration tests
changes: Added wiremock and reqwest dev-dependencies to the native crate for HTTP-level screenshot integration testing.
Added integration_screenshot_api.rs covering successful PNG decode, surfaced 500 responses, and per-request timeout handling.
Compiled and ran the new integration test target using the live package name playcua-native because this workspace does not contain a screenshot-api crate.
notes: The user-requested package name screenshot-api is not present in the current workspace; playcua-native is the only Rust package exposed by cargo metadata.
Cargo emitted pre-existing dead-code warnings from the native crate during the test build.
